arts.ttl: Champions League | Bologna v Borussia Dortmund: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Bologna are preparing for a challenging Champions League match against Borussia Dortmund, but they will have to navigate the game without key midfielder Michel Aebischer, who is sidelined due to a hernia issue. Long-term absentees Nicolo Cambiaghi and Oussama El Azzouzi have returned to training but are not expected to feature in the upcoming match. The post Champions League | Bologna v Borussia Dortmund: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Sahin not feeling under pressure despite Dortmund crisis
arts.sum: Despite being in the midst of a crisis with Borussia Dortmund, Nuri Sahin was in an optimistic state of mind at the press conference ahead of Tuesday's clash with Bologna.

arts.ttl: Dortmund to lose out in race for Chelsea defender?
arts.sum: Juventus appear to have moved ahead of Borussia Dortmund in the race to sign Chelsea defender Renato Veiga.
